sentence: 她在大学里念的是公共行政专业。
pinyin: Tā zài dà xué lǐ niàn de shì gōng gòng xíng zhèng zhuān yè.
english: She majored in public administration at university.

meaning: colloquial term for 生肖[sheng1 xiao4] the animals associated with the y
sentence: 你的属相是什么？我是属羊的。
pinyin: Nǐ de shǔ xiāng shì shén me? Wǒ shì shǔ yáng de.
english: What is your zodiac animal? Mine is the goat.

sentence: 软件的更新版修复了很多漏洞。
pinyin: Ruǎn jiàn de gēng xīn bǎn xiū fù le hěn duō lòu dòng.
english: The updated version of the software fixed many bugs.

sentence: 他每周都会买一张彩票试试运气。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōu dōu huì mǎi yī zhāng cǎipiào shìshi yùnqi.
english: He buys a lottery ticket every week to try his luck.

sentence: 下雨天他照样骑自行车上班。
pinyin: Xià yǔ tiān tā zhàoyàng qí zìxíngchē shàngbān.
english: Even on rainy days he still bikes to work as usual.
